data.title: Software Engineer
text: Built a REST API microservice that automated test coverage reporting for release teams, eliminating a manual multi-system process and accelerating release cycles by ~30% across 400 business-critical applications.

Automated end-to-end user and project provisioning onto an enterprise performance testing platform, replacing a manual ticketing workflow and scaling onboarding capacity to 1,088 production applications.

Migrated internal performance testing platform from 15 on-prem servers to an Ansible-automated deployment architecture, cutting environment setup time from days to minutes and achieving ~$100K in annual infrastructure savings.

Maintained operational integrity of testing automation frameworks by hosting office hours for 200+ teams across the enterprise, troubleshooting CI/CD pipeline dependencies, and resolving integration challenges.

data.title: Software Engineering Intern
text: Deployed containerized REST APIs with comprehensive error handling and health monitoring, reliably processing 50K+ daily requests for core web and mobile applications.
Architected scalable relational database with automated schema migrations using Liquibase, eliminating deployment challenges and supporting rapid feature releases.

data.title: Software Engineering Intern
text: Developed an internal document management portal from scratch using React, Node.js, and SQL, consolidating 1000+ company documents previously scattered across email and shared drives into a centralized repository.

data.title: Electrical Engineering Intern
text: Streamlined visualization of production output by developing a Python app that displays brix produced per minute in real-time using the Tkinter GUI library.
Maintained quality control for the production line by manually operating SIG Combibloc filling machine in aseptic conditions.
Drafted preliminary quality assurance protocols by creating electrical directives derived from Thai manuals.

data.title: Software Engineering Intern
text: Acquired experience in implementation of REST APIs and designing systems architecture for web applications.
Created several iterations of corporate intranet website by restructuring JavaScript web components.
Facilitated weekly conferences to ensure the development process among various teams is synchronously aligned and allocated Jira tasks accordingly.

data.title: Various Roles
text: Transported milk in bulk from storage facilities to various client locations including hotels, restaurants, and convenient stores.
Worked as a barista at a mini-kiosk at various sky-train locations.
Created technical directives to update machine manuals for the STORK heat treatment equipment in replacement of obsolete cleaning-in-place systems.
Conducted daily briefings with cross-functional teams to coordinate installation of STORK.
Worked with the mechanical team in to maintain operation of aqueduct systems.
